content.problemStatement:
Given NNN jobs, where each job has a start time, end time, and profit. Find the maximum total profit that can be obtained by selecting a subset of jobs such that no two selected jobs overlap in time. Two jobs overlap if one starts before another ends. However, a job can start at the same time when another job ends.


Input Format

First line contains TTT - the number of test cases
For each test case:

First line contains integer NNN - number of jobs
Second line contains NNN space-separated integers - start times
Third line contains NNN space-separated integers - end times
Fourth line contains NNN space-separated integers - profits




Output Format

For each test case, print the maximum possible profit that can be achieved by selecting non-overlapping jobs

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Select jobs at (1,3,50) and (3,5,70)
Time range [1-3]+[3-6] , we get profit of 120 = 50 + 70.
